hero.headline: Your route.
hero.subheading: Type where you need to go — naturally. AI figures out the best order and opens Google Maps with everything pre-filled.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: "I need to go to the pharmacy on Belgrano, then pick up my friend near the plaza"
howItWorks.step2Desc: Stops are identified, addresses resolved, and the route is optimized to minimize backtracking.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Everything is pre-filled — origin, stops, destination. Just hit Start.

install.headline: No app store needed
install.subheading: Add Route AI to your home screen in seconds.
install.androidStep2: Tap the menu (three dots) → "Add to Home Screen"
install.iphoneStep2: Tap the Share button (box with arrow)

app.subtitle: natural language → Google Maps
app.label: Describe your trip
app.placeholder: I need to go to the pharmacy on Belgrano, then the supermarket on San Juan, and pick up my friend near the plaza. About an hour.
app.locationUnavailable: ⚠ Location unavailable — results may be less accurate
app.voiceNotSupported: Voice not supported on this browser
app.voiceError: Could not hear you — try again
